visual.name: evmSCurveVisual
visual.description: Earned Value Management (EVM) S-Curve visual for construction and project controls. Displays PV, EV, AC cumulative curves and periodic bars with full EVM metrics: CPI, SPI, CV, SV, VAC, TCPI, EAC forecasting, data date line, variance bands, and KPI scorecard panel.

dataRoles.name: timePeriod
dataRoles.description: Date column or period label for the X-axis. Use a Date column to enable Year/Quarter/Month/Day hierarchy.

dataRoles.name: plannedValue
dataRoles.description: Budgeted Cost of Work Scheduled (BCWS) — cumulative or periodic

dataRoles.name: earnedValue
dataRoles.description: Budgeted Cost of Work Performed (BCWP) — cumulative or periodic

dataRoles.name: actualCost
dataRoles.description: Actual Cost of Work Performed (ACWP) — cumulative or periodic

dataRoles.name: budgetAtCompletion
dataRoles.description: Total authorized budget for the project or WBS element

dataRoles.name: estimateAtCompletion
dataRoles.description: Forecasted total cost at project completion (optional — auto-calculated if not provided)

dataRoles.name: estimateToComplete
dataRoles.description: Remaining cost forecast from data date to completion (optional)

dataRoles.name: periodicPV
dataRoles.description: Non-cumulative planned value for each period (for bar chart display)

dataRoles.name: periodicEV
dataRoles.description: Non-cumulative earned value for each period (for bar chart display)

dataRoles.name: periodicAC
dataRoles.description: Non-cumulative actual cost for each period (for bar chart display)

dataRoles.name: dataDateField
dataRoles.description: Numeric field marking the data date period (whole or decimal). The last non-null row is treated as the data date.

dataRoles.name: tooltipFields
dataRoles.description: Additional fields to show in tooltips

dataRoles.name: periodicETC
dataRoles.description: Non-cumulative estimate to complete for each future period (for bar/line display)

chartSettings.description: Overall chart appearance and layout settings

pvSettings.description: Styling for the PV / BCWS curve

evSettings.description: Styling for the EV / BCWP curve

acSettings.description: Styling for the AC / ACWP curve

etcSettings.description: Estimate to Complete line and periodic bar styling

vacSettings.description: Variance at Completion display on chart

bacSettings.description: Budget at Completion horizontal reference line

dataDateSettings.description: Vertical line marking the reporting cut-off date

kpiPanel.description: Configure the KPI scorecard displayed on the visual

varianceBands.description: Shaded areas between curves showing cost and schedule variance

showCVBand.displayName: Show Cost Variance Band (EV vs AC)

showSVBand.displayName: Show Schedule Variance Band (PV vs EV)

svBandAheadColor.displayName: SV Band — Ahead of Schedule Color

yAxis2.description: Secondary axis for SPI/CPI index lines

yAxis3.description: Right-side axis for cumulative PV/EV/AC lines

cpiLine.description: Cost Performance Index plotted on secondary axis

spiLine.description: Schedule Performance Index plotted on secondary axis

showVarianceCallouts.displayName: Show Variance Callouts at Data Date
